title: 255_413270_UFO's_and_Defense_What_Should_we_Prepare_For — image (page 003)
blurb: Embedded image extracted from page 003 of 255_413270_UFO's_and_Defense_What_Should_we_Prepare_For. This file contains an independent report on UFOs written by the French association COMETA (previously published in the French magazine VDS in 1999), which details the results of a study by the Institute of Higher Studies for National Defence. The file also includes a letter from Carol Rosin in which she notes that she was spokesperson for von Braun during the last years of his life.
